visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a Costco warehouse. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue beret and a dark blue off-shoulder top, stands in front of refrigerated shelves. She holds a green and black box of Castello Whipped Dip. The 'Costco Wholesale' logo is overlaid at the top. She smiles and points at the product while speaking. (2) A close-up shot shows a price tag on the shelf for 'CASTELLO GARLIC/PEPPER WHIPPED DIP' priced at $329. The lighting is bright and industrial. (3) The camera returns to the woman, who continues to present the box, turning it to show different sides. (4) Transition to an indoor living room setting. Two women sit behind a table. One is the woman from the store, now wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat, and another woman in a purple top. They are surrounded by plush toys and home decor. (5) A top-down close-up shows hands opening a round container of the whipped cheese, revealing a creamy, white textured substance with visible herb specks. A black spoon scoops into the dip. (6) The two women are seen reacting enthusiastically, gesturing with their hands and showing facial expressions of delight. They hold the containers and spread the dip onto crackers. (7) Close-up shots show the dip being spread smoothly onto a round cracker. (8) The final scene shows both women holding the product and a cracker, looking directly into the lens with high energy.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你知道現在在FB社團. [Variety]: 最紅的是什麼?. (2) [Slogan]: 神之抹醬. [Subtitle]: 就是這個 綜合輕打發起司醬. (3) [Subtitle]: 他有4罐 然後它價格是329元. (4) [Subtitle]: 所以每一個是82塊 然後它是Arla Foods來的. (5) [Subtitle]: 聽說只要加餅乾啊 或者抹麵包就超好吃. (6) [Variety]: 哇! 紅到爆. (7) [Subtitle]: 有那麼好吃嗎 回去試看看. (8) [Subtitle]: 我們來看看是不是 來打發我們. (9) [Variety]: 來打發我們的. (10) [Subtitle]: 希望不要打發我們. (11) [Variety]: 休想打發我. (12) [Subtitle]: 我是不會打發你的 因為. (13) [Subtitle]: 丹麥綜合輕乳酪 打發起司醬. (14) [Variety]: 真的好好吃喔. (15) [Variety]: 太美味了. (16) [Variety]: 輕盈的慕斯. (17) [Subtitle]: 但是它的味道超濃郁 你是一個 超愛起司重乳酪的人 不要錯過. (18) [Subtitle]: 加上它的調味是非常的高級 首先那個香蒜. (19) [Variety]: 就叫吃掉一個. (20) [Subtitle]: 大家如果你不拆封的話 可以放300天 你拆封五天內 要食用完. (21) [Subtitle]: 那你在第300天的時候拆封 就可以放305天. (22) [Subtitle]: 但是我跟你講 你香蒜只要一打開 你當天就會沒了. (23) [Subtitle]: 它香蒜呢 是有香料有層次的大蒜味. (24) [Variety]: 不油 超級入味. (25) [Subtitle]: 然後這個胡椒呢 是一開始吃 你只會吃到濃厚的乳酪 覺得平平無奇. (26) [Subtitle]: 不它那個胡椒香 會慢慢帶辛辣味 就會慢慢的出來跟你say hello. (27) [Subtitle]: 根本說不管是 配蘇打餅乾或麵包 你就是最幸福的女人或男人. (28) [Subtitle]: 沾著生菜吃也超好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the review and tasting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a blue beret and blue off-shoulder top in the first half, then switches to a zebra bucket hat. The second woman wears a purple V-neck top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half features Costco refrigerated shelves with various food items. Second half features a home living room with a grey sofa, plush pillows, and toys in a playpen area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice delivering a fast-paced introduction with a rising pitch contour. A bright, upbeat pop background music with a clear electronic beat begins immediately. A 'ding' sound effect punctuates the mention of the product. (2) As the scene transitions to the price tag, a short 'whoosh' sound is heard. The narrator's voice maintains high energy and clarity, detailing the cost. The BGM remains steady in the background. (3) Upon moving to the home setting, the vocal texture expands to include a second female voice. Both speak with high arousal and joyful valence, often overlapping with laughter. (4) A distinct 'pop' and 'squish' foley-style sound effect is audible when the container lid is peeled back and the spoon enters the dip. The music tempo feels consistent, driving the energetic pace of the conversation. (5) During the tasting segment, the voices become even more animated with dramatic pitch variations and elongated vowels to emphasize the 'deliciousness'. Rapid cuts in the audio track correspond with the frequent visual jump cuts, creating a hyper-dense information flow typical of social media reviews.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information -> Review -> Tasting -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an enthusiastic and informative review of Castello Whipped Dip available at Costco, encouraging viewers to purchase it by highlighting its value, flavor profile, and various serving suggestions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on one specific product, mentions the price and store, and provides a highly positive review with usage demos.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media style review with dense text overlays and fast editing.
